entity.label: Jambres
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of those who opposed Moses in Egypt (2 Tim. 3:8).

nodes.label: Jambres
nodes.description: One of those who opposed Moses in Egypt (2 Tim. 3:8).

verses.text: Now as Jannes and Jambres withstood Moses, so do these also resist the truth: men of corrupt minds, reprobate concerning the faith.
